tasks.name: ViT Fine-tuning Pipeline
tasks.description: Implement a Vision Transformer fine-tuning pipeline on CIFAR-100 with learning rate scheduling, data augmentation, and comparison against ResNet-50 baseline.

tasks.name: RAG System with Evaluation
tasks.description: Build a Retrieval-Augmented Generation system using FAISS for document retrieval and evaluate on a QA benchmark.

tasks.name: RL CartPole with Ablation
tasks.description: Implement DQN and PPO for CartPole-v1, run ablation on network depth and learning rate.

tasks.name: GAN Image Generation + FID
tasks.description: Train a DCGAN on MNIST, compute FID score, compare with WGAN-GP.

tasks.name: Transformer from Scratch
tasks.description: Implement a transformer encoder-decoder from scratch in PyTorch, train on a small translation task.

tasks.name: Federated Learning Simulation
tasks.description: Simulate federated averaging with 10 clients on MNIST, compare IID vs non-IID splits.

tasks.name: AutoML Hyperparameter Search
tasks.description: Implement Bayesian optimization for hyperparameter tuning of a random forest on UCI datasets.

tasks.name: Knowledge Graph Construction
tasks.description: Extract entities and relations from text using spaCy, build a knowledge graph, evaluate precision/recall.

tasks.name: Time Series Anomaly Detection
tasks.description: Implement LSTM autoencoder for anomaly detection on NAB dataset, compare with Isolation Forest.

tasks.name: Multi-Agent Debate System
tasks.description: Build a system where 3 LLM agents debate a topic, evaluate argument quality and convergence.
